title: 삼위일체 우주 대응표
summary: 삼위일체 우주 대응표는 세계, 세 에너지, 오리진, 보물, 트리네아드, 하위신, 아포라투스, 아홉 용, 아홉 나라의 구성값을 모은 조회 항목이다.
text:
## 국가별 현 인물과 조직

| 국가 | 현 엑시온 | 페르소나 | 구세주 후보 | 기능조직 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 염한 | [가인](../../characters/axions/가인/index.md) | [황 노인](../../characters/personas/황_노인/index.md) | [아백](../../characters/savior_candidates/아백/index.md) | [염객방](../realms/balance/organizations/염객방.md) |
| 우니오네 | [유리디스 도리안 드 발루아](../../characters/axions/유리디스_도리안_드_발루아/index.md) | [빈센트](../../characters/personas/빈센트/index.md) | [로렌초 카발리에리](../../characters/savior_candidates/로렌초_카발리에리/index.md) | [유랑 서커스](../realms/balance/organizations/유랑_서커스.md) |
| 마사오트 | [프로스페로](../../characters/axions/프로스페로/index.md) | [에어리얼](../../characters/personas/에어리얼/index.md) | [캘리번](../../characters/savior_candidates/캘리번/index.md) | [탐험가 길드](../realms/balance/organizations/탐험가_길드.md) |
| 알렉시아 | [엘피스](../../characters/axions/엘피스/index.md) | [탈레스](../../characters/personas/탈레스/index.md) | [메테우스](../../characters/savior_candidates/메테우스/index.md) | [인퀴지터](../realms/balance/organizations/인퀴지터.md) |
| 레이어드 | [마이더스](../../characters/axions/마이더스/index.md) | [카론](../../characters/personas/카론/index.md) | [케르베로스](../../characters/savior_candidates/케르베로스/index.md) | [글로벌 코텍스](../realms/balance/organizations/글로벌_코텍스.md) |
| 플라센티아 | [제페토](../../characters/axions/제페토/index.md) | [투르키나](../../characters/personas/투르키나/index.md) | [카스파르](../../characters/savior_candidates/카스파르/index.md) | [마스크맨](../realms/balance/organizations/마스크맨.md) |
| 오르딜리아 | [마텔다](../../characters/axions/마텔다/index.md) | [미노스](../../characters/personas/미노스/index.md) | [발데마르](../../characters/savior_candidates/발데마르/index.md) | [아웃로](../realms/balance/organizations/아웃로.md) |
| 파라디소 | [설리반](../../characters/axions/설리반/index.md) | [헬렌](../../characters/personas/헬렌/index.md) | [루시리엘](../../characters/savior_candidates/루시리엘/index.md) | [필그림즈](../realms/balance/organizations/필그림즈.md) |
| 오아시스 | [파우스트](../../characters/axions/파우스트/index.md) | [메피스토](../../characters/personas/메피스토/index.md) | [랄](../../characters/savior_candidates/랄/index.md) | [그레트헨 연구소](../realms/balance/organizations/그레트헨_연구소.md) |
